title: At the Beach in Cornwall
synopsis: A seaside trip to Cornwall brings waves, sand, and a very windy afternoon.
sentences: Luca had never seen the sea look so bright and wild before.
His family spent the day at a beach in Cornwall during the school holidays.
The wind pushed white waves toward the sand again and again.
Luca and his sister built a castle with a deep moat around it.
Their mother warned them not to build too close to the water.
Soon the tide came in and carried away one side of the castle.
Luca did not mind because he was already busy hunting for shells.
His father bought fish and chips wrapped in paper from a small shop nearby.
They ate on a bench while seagulls cried above them.
After lunch, Luca rolled up his trousers and ran through the cold water.
By late afternoon, his shoes were full of sand and his hair was full of salt.
It had been a messy day, but to Luca it felt perfect.
